creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/japanese/zipcodes gives a checksum error. The fetched file:
ken_all.lzh is newer than the distinfo file. Looks like it need
a new "make makesum" :-).

Fix: 

a new make makesum and the new distinfo file into CVS ? :-).
How-To-Repeat: Try to fetch it and do a make checksum.
